/cwe/weakness/614.Name: Sensitive Cookie in HTTPS Session Without 'Secure' Attribute
/cwe/weakness/614.Description: The Secure attribute for sensitive cookies in HTTPS sessions is not set.

CommonConsequences.Note: Omitting the secure flag makes it possible for the user agent to send the cookies in plaintext over an HTTP session.

Entries.IntroText: The snippet of code below, taken from a servlet doPost() method, sets an accountID cookie (sensitive) without calling setSecure(true).

PotentialMitigations.Description: Always set the secure attribute when the cookie should be sent via HTTPS only.
